'''Mirash Peet''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Induparan Crown Worlds]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he faced an aggressive [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] presence in his territory.

{{Char-stub}}
